authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.50(b)(55) — Hat Creek (Shasta Co.)
sources.quotedText: (55) Hat Creek (Shasta Co.) from Lake Britton upstream to Baum Lake, exclusive of the concrete Hat No. 2 intake canal between Baum Lake and the Hat No. 2 Powerhouse. All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.50(a) — General provisions for the special-regulations trout water list
sources.quotedText: (3) Daily bag and possession limits, unless otherwise noted, mean the total number of trout. (4) Unless otherwise provided, it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit.

sources.title: Hat Creek Wild Trout Management Plan — State of California Department of Fish and Wildlife
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 261142, "Hat Creek", Stream, Shasta Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":261142,"gaz_name":"Hat Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Shasta"}; geometry multipoint, first point (Web Mercator -13534068.8687, 5010809.4338) converts to lon -121.578610, lat 40.989610, at the creek's mouth on Lake Britton — matching Wikipedia's cited mouth coordinate (40.98972°N 121.57861°W) — and correcting this file's previous coordinate (-121.5500, 40.9750), which was off by roughly 2.9 km and appears to have been a guessed midpoint rather than the GNIS mouth location.

parameters.note: Applies to the segment of Hat Creek from Lake Britton upstream to Baum Lake.

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year, catch-and-release only, from Lake Britton upstream to Baum Lake
regulations.verbatimText: Hat Creek (Shasta Co.) from Lake Britton upstream to Baum Lake... All year.

parameters.note: This water's regulations exclude the concrete Hat No. 2 intake canal between Baum Lake and the Hat No. 2 Powerhouse, which is governed separately.

regulations.humanSummary: Excludes the concrete Hat No. 2 intake canal between Baum Lake and the Hat No. 2 Powerhouse from this water's regulation
regulations.verbatimText: exclusive of the concrete Hat No. 2 intake canal between Baum Lake and the Hat No. 2 Powerhouse.

regulations.humanSummary: 0 trout — catch-and-release only, from Lake Britton upstream to Baum Lake
Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
